steps.title: Read the boundary
steps.content:
The graph has boundary line $y=-4$, and the shaded region is above it. So the inequality is equivalent to
$$y>-4$$

steps.title: Determine the sign
steps.content:
The original inequality is $ry<60$. To turn it into $y>-4$, dividing by $r$ must reverse the inequality. Therefore, $r$ is negative and
$$\frac{60}{r}=-4$$
